context: Lunar New Year — Year of the Fire Horse (Bing Wu) begins. Day pillar: Water Dog. House of Family. Element amplifies Leisure, Mental, Social/Style, Travel. Generated by Claude (manual draft for sample/quality review) using the encoded signal payloads.

horoscopes.text: Have you been thinking about a place you used to live? Today's a good day to revisit somewhere from your past — your childhood neighborhood, an old apartment, a town you spent time in. Bring someone who'd appreciate the story. Big plans this year? Sketch them quietly first. The year ahead has plenty of room for thinking before doing.

Feeling a little restless? Pull yourself indoors and do something with your hands. Bake bread. Start a crossword. Get the soil ready for spring planting if your weather allows. Big decisions are not for today — let them sit. Your patience will be rewarded later in the week. A quiet evening is exactly what you need.

Tiger, your month is here — the year leans into your energy. Spend it with people who matter. Call a sibling. Drop in on a parent. Show up for someone whose corner you've quietly been in. If a cause has been calling you lately, today's the day to commit. Trust your gut — it's been right all along.

What a lovely day for gentle work. Try a new recipe — something a little more involved than your weeknight standard. If you've been talking about a weekend trip with the family, today's the day to actually book it. Somewhere with water. The day favors patience and craft, so go slow and let the process feel good.

Today is for laying low, not laying tracks. If you're feeling a little prickly, that's the day, not you. Skip the big push at work. Take yourself somewhere — a long drive, a longer walk, anywhere that isn't where you've been all week. A backyard fire and one good friend will do more than any plan could.

Letting things unfold at their own pace is your superpower today. Don't rush a conversation that needs time. Don't push a decision that wants to ripen. Pour a coffee, sit with the day, let people come to you. By evening, something you've been waiting on will start to make sense. Patience pays.

Big year for you, Horse — but today, ease into it. Get out of the house. A walk somewhere new, a drive with the windows down, a meal at the place you've been meaning to try. Your instincts are sharp this year, but so is your tendency to bolt. Move, yes. Just don't sprint into something you'll regret.

Stay close to home today. Cook something slow. Pull a book off the shelf you've been meaning to start. If you've got dinner plans, keep them short and the conversation light — patience may be in short supply. Skip any travel you can. By tomorrow, the small thing that's been bugging you will look much smaller.

People are unusually receptive to what you have to say today. Pitch the idea you've been sitting on. Float the project. Now is not the day for big commitments — keep it light, keep it moveable. Get the conversation started, then back off. The next month will throw curveballs; the smartest thing is to stay quick.

You've been running a tight ship — maybe too tight. If someone close has been quiet lately, that's worth paying attention to. Loosen the schedule today. Ask less of the people around you and more of the pizza menu. The career stuff is fine, it'll be there tomorrow. The relationship needs you tonight.

A perfect day to nest. Light the fire if you have one. Queue something atmospheric — an old film, a foreign series with subtitles, anything moody. Pour something good. If you've been meaning to plan a trip somewhere wild and a little romantic — Scotland, Iceland, the coast — today's the day to start the list. Cozy is sacred.

Tie up the small things you've been letting slide. Send the email. Make the appointment. Finish the puzzle. Then book yourself a massage if your shoulders have been carrying the week. Friends will lean on your good mood today, so plan a generous evening. You're the warmest person at the table — be that, on purpose.

voice_audit.sign_mention_rate: 16.7% (Tiger, Horse — both flagged by ben_ming_yue/nian, hence the deliberate use)
